'''nachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bicoastally|bicoastally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bicoastally|bicoastally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nachate|nachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nachatesher|nachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachatesherĂ«m|nachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nachatero|nachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nachateshĂ«|nachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachateshĂ«m|nachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinachatero|gokinachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinachateshĂ«|gokinachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachateshĂ«m|gokinachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonachankerom|gonachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonachankeshĂ«|gonachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachankeshĂ«m|gonachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonachankeya|gonachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nachaterom|nachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachatemu|nachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nachateya|nachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinachaterom|gokinachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachatemu|gokinachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinachateya|gokinachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nachachate|nachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nachachatesher|nachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachatesherĂ«m|nachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nachachatero|nachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nachachateshĂ«|nachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachateshĂ«m|nachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinachachatero|gokinachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinachachateshĂ«|gokinachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachateshĂ«m|gokinachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonachachankerom|gonachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonachachankeshĂ«|gonachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachachankeshĂ«m|gonachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonachachankeya|gonachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nachachaterom|nachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachatemu|nachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nachachateya|nachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinachachaterom|gokinachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachatemu|gokinachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinachachateya|gokinachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠte|nĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠtesher|nĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠtero|nĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠtero|gokinĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠterom|nĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠtemu|nĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠchĂŠteya|nĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠterom|gokinĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠchĂŠteya|gokinĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafchafte|nafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafchaftesher|nafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafchaftesherĂ«m|nafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafchaftero|nafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafchafteshĂ«|nafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafchafteshĂ«m|nafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafchaftero|gokinafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafchafteshĂ«|gokinafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafchafteshĂ«m|gokinafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafchafnkerom|gonafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafchafnkeshĂ«|gonafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafchafnkeshĂ«m|gonafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafchafnkeya|gonafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafchafterom|nafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafchaftemu|nafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafchafteya|nafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafchafterom|gokinafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafchaftemu|gokinafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafchafteya|gokinafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
